subject: refactor(theme): replace combo system with per-mode individual theme picker
body:
Dark/light toggle now controls which theme list is shown. Each mode
stores its own DaisyUI theme independently (lightTheme/darkTheme in
localStorage). Full DaisyUI catalogue exposed: 22 light, 13 dark themes.

Tags: theme, ui, refactor, daisyui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
